claims.description: The V2 freeform Mentor route opener remains authoritative for session raw input and traverses subject resolution, session creation, deterministic outbox, streaming, and event persistence before later input.
The deterministic mentor-opener session key and transcript-aware restoration continue to prevent remount, retry, drain, and replay duplication while preserving learner/Mentor ordering.
The internally allocated session ID is backfilled without running the focused-screen reset, while genuine navigation and later focus resets retain their existing behavior.
The real session screen regression drives opener classification and streaming through route backfill and a Yes follow-up, retaining streaming, subject/topic recovery context, and exact ordering.

The persisted-session integration coverage retains question and declarative openers, delayed creation, retry/restart, already-created sessions, hydration, canonical raw input, and downstream transcript ordering.
Historical proof plus reviewer-rework RED, GREEN, production-only REVERT, RESTORE, validation counts, and caveats are preserved without deleting prior evidence.
Fresh final latest-main integration reran the complete learning-session file and preserved all 22 scenarios after the history-preserving main merge.
Fresh final mobile verification covers the session screen, streaming hook, subject classification, and message outbox with 149 passing tests.
